title: 1.1: Reports the recurring log entries that appear when the server is idle(e.g.: Alert scheduler notifications, usage stats, cleanup service and plugin update checker messages).
1.2: Reports runtime evidence of the database migration check (e.g.: "Starting DB migrations" and "migrations completed").
1.3: States that the output confirming schema version is up to date shows "migration completed" with performed=0 and skipped showing the total migration count( e.g.: performed=0 skipped=626).
1.4: States the version string value obtained by querying the API endpoint (e.g.: Grafana v11.5.0-pre (4550cfb5b7).
1.5: States that the datasource picker does not automatically resolve to the datasource defined in the panel queries for V2 dashboards.
1.6: Shows test script output demonstrating the dashboard picker bug in which the picker uses the last used datasource instead of the datasource defined in the panel queries.
1.8: States that the backend's rule definition does not populate the queries array.
1.9: Shows test script output demonstrating the alerting rule bug with values. (e.g.: Expression field: sum(rate(http_requests_total[5m])), Queries array length: 0).
1.10: Identifies rule-form.ts as the codebase location for the alerting form hydration behavior.
